# daytona_admin_set_default_docker_registry (Action)

Sets a Daytona Docker registry as the admin default registry. This action requires Daytona admin privileges.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `registry_id` (String) Daytona Docker registry ID to make the default registry.
